nasb.text: And stretching out His hand toward His disciples, He said, “Behold My mother and My brothers!

esv.text: And stretching out his hand toward his disciples, he said, “Here are my mother and my brothers!

cnv.text: 他伸手指著門徒說：“你看，我的母親，我的弟兄！

ccb.text: 祂伸出手来指着门徒说：“你们看！这些人就是我的母亲和我的兄弟。

csbs.text: 他就伸手指着他的门徒们，说：“看，我的母亲、我的弟兄！
